mnemonics.title: ECC Key Size Comparison
mnemonics.content: RSA Keys Are Big - ECC Keys Are Small: Remember that 2048-bit RSA ≈ 224-bit ECC, 3072-bit RSA ≈ 256-bit ECC for equivalent security levels

mnemonics.title: ECDH Process
mnemonics.content: Private Times Public Equals Secret: Each party multiplies their private key with the other's public key to get the shared secret
